info.name: Feta
info.attribution:
- Game layout, scripting, and pyramid and ship player pieces, by lesko, released to the Public Domain under CC0.
- Map by lesko, created in ArcGIS with GIS vector linework by Dylan Moriarty on Project Linework https://www.projectlinework.org/. Released under CC BY-NC 4.0
- Player Aid text written and released as CC0 by GeoMan.
- Library image by Gundula Vogel available under the Pexels License at https://www.pexels.com/photo/cubes-of-feta-cheese-with-fresh-basil-and-tomatoes-32356157/ - Tile and card icon assets from https://game-icons.net available under CC BY 3.0 as described in the About overlay
info.description: Fight over the control of the island of Feta.
info.similarAwards:
2005 Meeples Choice Award Nominee
2005 Japan Boardgame Prize Best Advanced Game Nominee
